# Purchase Order Line Menu

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Adds a menu item to list all Purchase Order lines.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

Menu option available at Purchase > Orders > Purchase Order Lines.
